content: Overlay-label slice: moved edge labels/badges away from connector lanes with larger annotation offsets and reserved badge placement. Replaced SVG hover tooltips for auth/dataflow/boundary/permission/validation summaries with click-triggered popups: labels/badges now expose popup metadata, clicking opens a fixed popup near the label, outside click or Escape closes it, and details are rendered as readable key/value rows without executing DSL content. render() now attaches/disposes label-popup interaction for SVG targets independently of pan/zoom. Verification: in-app browser smoke on http://127.0.0.1:5175/ confirmed 13 popup triggers, 0 legacy hover tooltips, popup opens and outside click closes; npm test (230 passing); npx tsc --noEmit; npm run build. Existing untracked reports/ was left untouched. Dev server is running on 127.0.0.1:5175 because 5173/5174 were occupied. Next: visual QA on GitHub Pages after deploy, especially warning/boundary badge spacing on dense samples.
